description: Style NoteIntense for women by hugo boss was launched in fall 2003 - a sharply floral fragrance. The nose behind this fragrance is Ursula Wandel.Product DetailsThe top notes are oxygen accord, kumquat, spices melting down to a heart of sweet vanilla, jasmine and rose. The base consists of sandalwood, patchouli, musk, amber notes and benzoin resin.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize90 ml
